name: bandit.roof_fire_horde_player_action_mcw
description: Roof-fire horde detection product-path probe: prove saved roof/elevated footing, stage horde/distance only, create the credited roof fire through normal Apply->brazier and Apply->lighter player actions, wait a bounded 5 minutes through the real wait UI, require live horde-light signal artifacts, then save and inspect elapsed turn/map/horde response metadata. Attempt 2 intentionally skips the old look/OCR visible-brazier gate on roof footing after run 20260429_171831 produced blank OCR there; deploy prompt UI trace, lighter target/source prompt, message-log ignition proof, and final saved f_brazier/fd_fire carry the product-path proof instead. Frau approved attempt 3: replace the brittle post-confirm OCR ignition gate with a result-state message-log guard before wait/horde proof. Attempt 4 correction: the saved-player .log is an overmap event log and did not carry transient ignition messages, so the roof-fire result gate is now guarded save/writeback plus saved roof f_brazier/fd_fire before horde waiting.
artifact_patterns: openclaw_harness_ui_trace: component=direction_prompt event=return message="Light where?" action="RIGHT" chosen_direction=yes dx=1 dy=0 dz=0

steps.label: roof_fire_horde_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: The roof-fire horde fixture is loaded before roof/elevated footing, horde footing, and normal player firestarter action are audited.

steps.label: normal_map_entry_before_roof_fire_deploy
steps.abort_reason: startup did not land on normal map UI; do not type Apply/deploy/lighter keys through raw item-info/JSON text
steps.expected_visible_fact: Startup lands directly on normal map UI after relocating the saved player to the roof/elevated z-level; no blind key is sent through a stale view.

steps.label: audit_saved_player_on_roof_tile_before_fire_action
steps.abort_reason: saved map metadata did not show the relocated player/target footing on t_tile_flat_roof before roof-fire action proof
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved map metadata proves the player-relative roof/elevated z-level footing before any fire action is credited; this is setup footing, not fire proof

steps.label: audit_saved_inventory_has_brazier_and_lighter_before_apply
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player live-accessible inventory contains the exact brazier and charged lighter setup before the Apply inventory path is opened
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit Apply/deploy/lighter UI steps if the exact brazier or lighter item is missing from live-accessible saved-player inventory
steps.abort_reason: exact brazier or lighter fixture item missing from live-accessible saved-player inventory before player-action deploy/firestarter audit

steps.label: audit_saved_horde_before_roof_fire_action
steps.abort_reason: saved overmap horde_map metadata did not contain the staged mon_zombie horde at player-relative offset [0,-120,0] before roof-fire action proof
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved overmap horde_map metadata contains the staged horde before the normal player-created roof fire and wait path; horde staging is setup-only

steps.label: open_apply_inventory_for_brazier_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-backed Apply key is sent for brazier deployment; the following harness UI trace gate must prove the Use item inventory opened before another unsafe key fires.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_apply_inventory_open_for_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves the Use item inventory opened for brazier deployment
steps.next_step_gate: do not type brazier inventory filter keys unless the Use item inventory-open trace is present
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove the Use item inventory opened before filtering for brazier

steps.label: filter_apply_inventory_for_brazier_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The filter key is sent only after the Use item inventory-open trace is green for brazier.

steps.label: type_brazier_filter_for_apply_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The brazier filter text is submitted only after the Apply inventory-open trace is green; the following UI trace gate proves the highlighted filtered row.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_filtered_brazier_selected
required_patterns: openclaw_harness_ui_trace: component=inventory_selector event=state title="Use item" filter="brazier" action="redraw" selection_method="highlight_after_redraw"
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace after redraw proves the Apply inventory filter is brazier and the highlighted row is the brazier item
steps.preconditions: the Use item inventory is open and the brazier filter text was typed.
steps.next_step_gate: do not press confirm unless the highlighted filtered row is proven as brazier
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove filtered highlighted item was brazier before confirm

steps.label: select_filtered_brazier_expect_deploy_prompt
steps.expected_visible_fact: The filtered brazier inventory row is confirmed; following harness UI trace gates must prove the returned item is brazier and Deploy where? opened.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_brazier_selected_and_deploy_prompt_open
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves the selector returned brazier and opened Deploy where?
steps.preconditions: select_filtered_brazier_expect_deploy_prompt confirmed the filtered Apply inventory row.
steps.next_step_gate: do not send right/east unless the returned item is brazier and the Deploy where? prompt is open
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove selected brazier plus Deploy where? before right/east

steps.label: place_prompted_brazier_east
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-backed Deploy where? prompt accepts right/east and returns to the map; the following UI trace gate proves right/east was consumed by that prompt.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_deploy_prompt_consumed_right
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves right/east was consumed by the Deploy where? direction prompt
steps.next_step_gate: do not inspect or run lighter/fire proof unless right/east was consumed by the Deploy where? prompt
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove right/east was consumed by Deploy where?

steps.label: audit_saved_source_firewood_zone_before_lighter
steps.required_name_contains: OpenClaw roof-fire horde source firewood proof zone
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved zone metadata contains SOURCE_FIREWOOD over/around the roof brazier/log target before lighter activation
steps.preconditions: audit_ui_trace_deploy_prompt_consumed_right proved normal Apply->brazier->Deploy where?->east completed on roof footing.
steps.next_step_gate: do not run or credit lighter/fire proof unless source-firewood zone metadata is green after roof brazier deployment; visible look/OCR was intentionally not used on this roof path because attempt 20260429_171831 produced blank OCR at the look gate.
steps.abort_reason: saved roof SOURCE_FIREWOOD zone metadata missing before lighter/fire step

steps.label: open_apply_inventory_for_lighter_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-backed Apply key is sent for the charged lighter after the roof Deploy where? UI-trace gate and source-zone metadata gate; the following harness UI trace gate must prove the Use item inventory opened before filter/selection keys fire.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_apply_inventory_open_for_lighter
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves the Use item inventory opened for lighter activation
steps.preconditions: open_apply_inventory_for_lighter_text_guard sent the source-backed Apply key after a green visible brazier gate.
steps.next_step_gate: do not type lighter filter keys unless the Use item inventory-open trace is present
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove the Use item inventory opened before filtering for lighter

steps.label: filter_apply_inventory_for_lighter_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The filter key is sent only after the Use item inventory-open trace is green for lighter activation.

steps.label: type_lighter_filter_for_apply_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The lighter filter text is submitted only after the Apply inventory-open trace is green; the following UI trace gate proves the highlighted filtered row is the lighter.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_filtered_lighter_selected
required_patterns: openclaw_harness_ui_trace: component=inventory_selector event=state title="Use item" filter="lighter" action="redraw" selection_method="highlight_after_redraw"
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace after redraw proves the Apply inventory filter is lighter and the highlighted row is the lighter item
steps.preconditions: the Use item inventory is open and the lighter filter text was typed.
steps.next_step_gate: do not press confirm unless the highlighted filtered row is proven as lighter
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove filtered highlighted item was lighter before confirm

steps.label: select_filtered_lighter_expect_light_prompt
steps.expected_visible_fact: Confirming the filtered lighter item through the normal Apply inventory should invoke the firestarter and open the targeting prompt after the visible deployed-brazier gate; OCR may read this as `ight where?`, so exact gating is deferred to audit_ui_trace_lighter_selected_and_light_prompt_open.
steps.failure_rule: screenshot/OCR is captured here, but OCR may drop the leading L in Light where?; trust the following harness UI trace gate for exact selected lighter + Light where? before any direction key.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_lighter_selected_and_light_prompt_open
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves the selector returned lighter and opened Light where?
steps.preconditions: select_filtered_lighter_expect_light_prompt confirmed the filtered Apply inventory row and screenshot/OCR showed Light where?.
steps.next_step_gate: do not send right/east unless the returned item is lighter and the Light where? prompt is open
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove selected lighter plus Light where? before right/east

steps.label: target_direction_east_to_visible_brazier_logs
steps.abort_reason: after choosing east from Light where?, OCR did not show the expected source-firewood confirmation prompt; stop before pressing confirmation
steps.expected_visible_fact: The east direction from the firestarter targeting prompt reaches the visibly deployed brazier/log tile covered by SOURCE_FIREWOOD and opens the firewood-source confirmation prompt; OCR may drop the leading `Do`, so the guard keys on `burn your firewood source`.
steps.preconditions: select_filtered_lighter_expect_light_prompt and audit_ui_trace_lighter_selected_and_light_prompt_open showed Light where? before this direction key

steps.label: confirm_burn_source_firewood_prompt_after_visible_brazier
abort_if_text_contains: Do you really want to burn your firewood source?
Are you sure you want to start fire here?  There's a much more appropriate spot adjacent.
There's a brazier there but you haven't set it up to contain the fire.  Continue?
steps.abort_reason: after accepting the SOURCE_FIREWOOD prompt, OCR still showed the prompt/targeting text; stop before message-log/save/fd_fire audit
steps.expected_visible_fact: The case-sensitive source-firewood confirmation is accepted with uppercase Y. Attempt 4 does not rely on brittle roof OCR or the saved-player overmap event log for transient action messages; the following guarded save plus saved roof f_brazier/fd_fire metadata is the result-state gate before any horde wait.
steps.preconditions: target_direction_east_to_visible_brazier_logs showed the source-firewood confirmation prompt; UI trace already proved Apply-inventory lighter opened Light where? and RIGHT was consumed.
steps.failure_rule: If OCR still shows the source prompt or targeting prompt after uppercase Y, stop before treating save metadata as action result proof.
steps.next_step_gate: only proceed toward horde wait if the following guarded save/writeback and saved roof target metadata contain f_brazier plus fd_fire.

steps.label: advance_visible_brazier_firestarter_activity_to_completion
steps.expected_visible_fact: A bounded turn advance lets the normal roof firestarter aftermath settle after accepting the source-firewood prompt; result proof is deferred to the following guarded save/writeback and saved fd_fire/f_brazier metadata.
steps.next_step_gate: wait/horde proof is allowed only if the following saved-map guard sees roof f_brazier plus fd_fire after a guarded save.

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_roof_fire_result_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after roof firestarter action resolution and before the guarded roof-fire result save

steps.label: request_direct_save_after_roof_fire_result
steps.abort_reason: after requesting a save following the roof firestarter action, OCR did not show the Save and quit prompt before uppercase-Y confirmation
steps.expected_visible_fact: Save command is requested after the roof firestarter action; mtime and saved map metadata prove acceptance after confirmation

steps.label: confirm_direct_save_after_roof_fire_result
steps.expected_visible_fact: uppercase Y confirms the recorded save prompt after the roof firestarter action; following mtime/map-state gates prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_roof_fire_result_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the roof-fire result save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed roof-fire result save, proving the following map metadata reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_roof_fire_target_before_horde_wait
steps.abort_reason: guarded same-run saved roof target metadata did not contain player-created f_brazier plus fd_fire after normal Apply-inventory lighter/source-firewood action
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved map metadata contains roof/elevated terrain plus f_brazier/fd_fire from the normal player action path before any horde wait; no fixture fd_fire transform is present
steps.next_step_gate: only proceed to bounded horde wait if this roof-fire result-state gate is green

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_before_roof_fire_horde_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player turn baseline is recorded before the bounded roof-fire horde wait so the final guarded save can prove elapsed in-game time

steps.label: wait_5_minutes_for_roof_fire_horde_signal
steps.abort_reason: bounded 5-minute wait was interrupted or left a prompt visible; screenshot/OCR artifacts classify the blocker before any response key is sent
steps.expected_visible_fact: the real wait UI is opened, Wait a while is chosen, 5 minutes is selected, and same-run artifacts must show live roof-fire light reaching the horde signal bridge
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted, signal artifacts are absent, or elapsed time cannot be proven by the later saved turn delta, this packet is inconclusive/non-green.

steps.label: audit_roof_fire_horde_light_signal_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain roof-fire live-light horde signal lines after the bounded wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact contains live light scan and horde light signal lines from the player-created roof fire source

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_roof_fire_horde_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after the roof-fire horde wait and before guarded save/writeback

steps.label: request_direct_save_after_roof_fire_horde_wait
steps.abort_reason: after requesting a save following the bounded roof-fire horde wait, OCR did not show the Save and quit prompt before uppercase-Y confirmation
steps.expected_visible_fact: Save command is requested after the bounded roof-fire wait; mtime proves acceptance after confirmation

steps.label: confirm_direct_save_after_roof_fire_horde_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: uppercase Y confirms the recorded save prompt; following mtime/state gates prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_roof_fire_horde_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the post-wait roof-fire horde save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed post-wait save, proving the following turn/map/horde metadata reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_after_roof_fire_horde_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved player turn counter did not advance by at least 250 turns after the bounded wait and guarded save
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved player turn counter advanced by a bounded 5-minute-scale delta after the real wait UI path

steps.label: audit_saved_roof_fire_target_after_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved roof target metadata did not contain player-created f_brazier plus fd_fire after the normal deploy/lighter path and bounded wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved map metadata after guarded save contains the roof/elevated terrain plus f_brazier/fd_fire from the normal player action path; no fixture fd_fire transform is present

steps.label: audit_saved_horde_after_roof_fire_signal_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved overmap horde_map metadata did not show the staged horde retargeted/tracking the roof-fire source after the bounded wait and save
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved overmap horde_map metadata shows a mon_zombie horde with positive tracking intensity and destination at the roof-fire source submap after live horde light signaling

evidence_contract.claim: a normal player-created roof/elevated fire can produce live horde-light signaling and saved horde response metadata after bounded time passage
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load/setup proof only / inconclusive for roof-fire horde detection
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No roof-horde credit if roof/elevated footing, normal player deploy/lighter path, source prompt consumption, guarded roof-fire result save, saved roof f_brazier/fd_fire, bounded wait, horde-light artifact, final save/writeback, turn delta, or saved horde response metadata is missing or non-green.
